project: SignX Warehouse - KeyedIn ERP & Informer Full Data Extraction
description: Extract ALL data from KeyedIn ERP (main system) and Informer BI (30 reports) into CSV files for the Eagle Sign Decision Intelligence Engine. Current state: Customer Listing extraction works via manually-captured payload. Reconnaissance reveals capture script targets wrong endpoint (commandService vs ViewRPCService), 11 reports fail Launch click, 3 have no 'Launch Report' button, and required-param reports block on validation.

userStories.title: Fix capture_all_reports.py network interception
userStories.description: As a data engineer, I want the capture script to intercept ViewRPCService POST requests (not just commandService) so that report payloads are actually captured when 'Launch Report' is clicked.
acceptanceCriteria: Network interception listens for both ViewRPCService and commandService endpoints
Captured payloads saved with endpoint type in filename (e.g. report_customer_listing_view_request.txt)
Response bodies also captured for ViewRPCService POSTs
Python syntax check passes (py_compile)
Smoke test: import capture_all_reports succeeds

userStories.title: Fix Launch click for all 30 reports
userStories.description: As a data engineer, I want the capture script to successfully click 'Launch' for all 30 reports, including the 11 that currently fail with 'all_strategies_failed'.
acceptanceCriteria: Reports with 'Export' in name handled (different UI pattern - may not have Launch link)
Reports visible on page 2 of reports list navigated to correctly
Strategy fallback uses JS-based row matching for reports not found by text locator
Recon confirms Launch click succeeds for at least 22 non-export reports
Export reports flagged as separate category (not treated as failures)

userStories.title: Handle required parameters in parameter dialogs
userStories.description: As a data engineer, I want the capture script to fill required date fields with a wide date range (2000-01-01 to 2099-12-31) before clicking 'Launch Report' so that required-param reports don't block on validation.
acceptanceCriteria: Required date fields (marked with red asterisk) detected and filled
Wide date range used: start=2000-01-01, end=2099-12-31 (captures all historical data)
Non-required params left empty (returns all data)
AR Invoice Details successfully fires ViewRPCService POST after filling Invoice Date
AR Invoice Listing, Inventory Transaction History, Invoice Register also work
Reports without Launch Report button (AR Open Invoices, Open Sales Orders, Open Work Orders) handled gracefully

userStories.title: Update scrape_informer.py to replay ViewRPCService payloads
userStories.description: As a data engineer, I want scrape_informer.py to accept and replay ViewRPCService payloads (in addition to existing commandService payloads) so that captured browser payloads can be used for HTTP-based extraction.
acceptanceCriteria: load_captured_payload() detects payload type (view vs command) from filename or content
New replay_view_rpc() method sends payload to ViewRPCService endpoint
ViewToken extracted from ViewRPCService response (same gwt_parser)
Pagination via getData works with ViewRPCService-obtained ViewTokens
Existing commandService flow unchanged (backward compatible)
Python syntax check passes
Existing test suite still passes (14/14)

userStories.title: Capture all 30 report payloads
userStories.description: As a data engineer, I want to run capture_all_reports.py and successfully capture ViewRPCService payloads for all launchable reports so that scrape_informer.py has the data it needs.
acceptanceCriteria: capture_all_reports.py --skip-existing runs successfully
At least 20 of 30 reports have captured payload files in C:\Scripts\keyedin-capture\reports\
field_names_manifest.json updated with discovered field names
Export-only reports documented as requiring different approach
No-Launch-Report-button reports documented with screenshots

userStories.title: Extract all reports to CSV via HTTP
userStories.description: As a data engineer, I want to run scrape_informer.py and extract all captured reports to CSV files so that the data warehouse has complete Informer data.
acceptanceCriteria: scrape_informer.py processes all reports with captured payloads
CSV files written to warehouse/processed/ with correct column headers
Row counts logged for each report
At least 15 reports produce non-empty CSV output
Customer Listing still extracts 6269 rows (regression check)
3-tier field discovery works (REPORT_FIELDS -> manifest -> auto-discovery)

userStories.title: Clean up temporary files and debug code
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all temporary recon scripts, debug screenshots, and debug code blocks removed so that the codebase is clean and production-ready.
acceptanceCriteria: recon_informer_ui.py deleted (temporary recon script)
PLAN.md deleted (superseded by PRD)
All DEBUG code blocks removed from capture_all_reports.py (DOM dump, debug screenshots, debug POST listener)
warehouse/raw/recon/ directory cleaned up
warehouse/raw/debug_dialog.png and ar_invoice_dialog.png removed
No print() debug statements in any script

userStories.title: KeyedIn Main ERP reconnaissance
userStories.description: As a data engineer, I want a complete map of KeyedIn ERP's main application (not Informer) including all accessible modules, pages, data endpoints, and export capabilities so that we can plan full ERP data extraction.
acceptanceCriteria: ERP main menu structure documented (all top-level modules)
Key data pages identified (Customers, Vendors, Sales Orders, Purchase Orders, Inventory, Work Orders, GL)
Data export options mapped (CSV export, print-to-file, API endpoints)
URL patterns documented for each module
Authentication flow verified (SSO tokens, session management)
Reconnaissance report saved as structured JSON
